understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by moving each selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+' in the semantic grid. A level is won when every goal tile is occupied by a selectable piece simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is performed via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN actions, which shift the currently selected piece in the chosen direction. Some objects are pushable blocks; pushing occurs when a pushable object is immediately adjacent in the movement direction and shifts with the selected piece. Walls and boundaries may block movement in various ways. Multiple selectable pieces exist per level; CLICK with a target_position in pixel/grid coordinates switches control to a different selectable piece at that location. The semantic_grid shows P for the selected piece, S for other selectables, B for blocks, # for walls, + for goals, and . for empty cells. Heuristic movement_blocked hints may be inaccurate, so experimentation is required.
